description: SearchApi provides APIs that return structured JSON data from search engines, maps, shopping, travel, ads libraries, and similar public web result sources. Its product is aimed at real-time search-result extraction and normalization across many engines and sites.
summary: searchapi.io exposes a documented HTTP API under `https://www.searchapi.io/api/v1` authenticated by a SearchApi API key, and it also advertises a remote MCP integration but does not publicly document the MCP connect endpoint or auth details.
